key.name: hotspot-ssid
key.description: The name of the Wi-Fi hotspot network

key.name: use-password
key.description: Whether the hotspot requires a password

key.name: hotspot-password
key.description: The WPA2 pre-shared key (password) for the hotspot

key.name: max-clients
key.description: The maximum number of connected devices allowed (set to 0 for unlimited)
